agent_prompt: Run the pipe2 dance-reel recipe via the pipe2 CLI. Defaults produce a K-pop breakdancer reel with a vocal-led Eleven Music bed — pass --subject, --style, --moves, --music to customize, or --persona / --watermark-url for branded output. Report the final video URL when done.

chain.what_it_does: GPT Image 2 renders a 16-panel dance move reference grid — one labeled pose per cell.
Eleven Music composes a vocal-led K-pop dance bed. Generated FIRST so the dance can be choreographed to its rhythm.
Claude designs a ken-burns pan over the grid so it reads on screen before the dance starts.
Seedance 2 Pro generates the dance clip. The grid tags as @image1 for choreography, the music tags as @audio1 for beat-conditioning — choreography is synced to the actual track.
Claude stitches grid-reveal + dance with a snappy crossfade and the music bed.
Overlays the Pipe2 logo (or your own --watermark-url) at the top-left corner so the clip carries attribution across reposts. Pass --no-watermark to skip.

description: Generate a labeled dance-move grid with GPT Image 2, hand it to Seedance 2 Pro as a reference so the choreography actually follows the moves, then stitch it into a music-synced vertical reel.

aspect_ratio.description: Output aspect ratio. 9:16 for TikTok/Reels, 16:9 for landscape.

dance_seconds.description: Duration of the Seedance segment. 4-15s; total reel is +3s for the grid reveal.

dance_style.description: Genre/style label — e.g. "K-pop solo choreography", "urban hip-hop", "classical ballet".

moves.default: moonwalk, body roll, donkey kick, electric slide
moves.description: Comma-separated list of named moves Seedance should perform in order.

music_mood.default: K-pop dance anthem at 128 BPM. Punchy four-on-the-floor kick, sidechained glossy synth lead, glittery hi-hats, percussive synth stab on the off-beats. Full energy from bar one, no intro.
music_mood.description: Mood prompt for the Eleven Music bed.

music_url.description: Pre-existing music file (URL or local path). When set, music-generator is skipped and this track is used directly.

no_watermark.description: Ship the output unbranded. Skips the watermark step entirely.

persona.description: Optional persona description (e.g. 'red-haired fashion-forward 21-year-old influencer in pink avant-garde outfit'). When set, generates a multi-angle character sheet first and passes it to Seedance as a second reference image so the dance preserves identity across frames.

persona_url.description: Pre-existing persona reference (URL or local path — same shape as --music-url / --watermark-url). When set, image-generator is skipped and this image goes directly to Seedance as the identity anchor. Use for recurring brand mascots or when you already have a character sheet you trust.

subject.description: Who's dancing. Used in both the grid render and the Seedance prompt.

watermark_scale_pct.description: Watermark width as a percentage of the video width.

watermark_url.description: Override the default Pipe2 logo with your own image (URL or local path). Empty means use the bundled Pipe2 watermark.

watermark_variant.description: Which bundled Pipe2 logo to use when --watermark-url is empty. "light" for dark videos, "dark" for bright ones; coloured variants match the clip palette.

intro_voiceover: Most AI dance videos look like slop because the model is guessing the moves frame by frame. The fix is to pre-author a movement grid with GPT Image 2 and pass it to Seedance 2 Pro as a reference image — now it has a storyboard to follow. This recipe chains the grid, the dance, and a matching music bed into one reel.
title: One prompt → a vertical AI dance reel
